description_long: This arcade game cabinet is styled to resemble a medieval castle, with crenellated battlements at the top and a faux stone base. The side panels are decorated with vibrant artwork featuring a fantasy elf character in armor, along with the game title 'Elben Quest' in bold, stylized lettering. The front of the cabinet features a large display screen, a control panel with multiple buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot area below. The cabinet is primarily constructed from wood or MDF, with printed graphics and a glass or plastic screen cover. The color scheme is dominated by deep reds, grays, and black, with stone textures and fantasy-themed illustrations. The overall build is robust and designed for public use in arcades or entertainment venues.
description: A fantasy-themed arcade game cabinet with castle-like features, vibrant elf artwork, and a classic control panel. The cabinet is robust, colorful, and designed for interactive play.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the 'Elben Quest' title and a large elf character graphic, with castle battlements and a stone-textured base.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back panel, ventilation or access panel, and the crenellated top edge.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same elf artwork, game title, and castle motif.
description_view_3: Front view showing the display screen with 'Elben Quest' title, control panel with buttons and joystick, coin slot, and marquee at the top.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and six round buttons arranged in two rows, plus a start button and coin slot below; control panel is black with colored buttons.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Elben Quest' title in gold on a dark background, matching the fantasy theme of the cabinet.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature large, colorful artwork of a fantasy elf character in armor, with the 'Elben Quest' title and a red striped background, plus a stone-textured lower section.
